page_metadata.biotools__summary: A software package that can predict peptide binding affinity to major histocompatability complex I. The software implements allele-specific neural networks that use a novel architecture and peptide encoding scheme.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A software package that can predict peptide binding affinity to major histocompatability complex I. The software implements allele-specific neural networks that use a novel architecture and peptide encoding scheme.
